DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS PHUOC KHA AND NELSON KHAN'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER - DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MAY HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF INFORMATION RELEVANT TO ISSUES IN THIS CASE THAT HIS SON DOES NOT. IN ADDITION, THE COURT INDICATED THAT THE DEPOSITION IS TO TAKE PLACE WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM TODAY (08/30/11). JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MAY HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF INFORMATION RELEVANT TO ISSUES IN THIS CASE THAt HIS SON DOES NOT.
